grid.provenance: standard VASL geoboard: 1800x645 px, 33 letter-columns A..GG x 10 rows; odd columns shift UP half a hex (B1 centered on the top edge)

sides.note: unit name = counter image path; VASL squads are ELR-ladder layer counters, make_save stamps the resolved layer image (ge/ge467S = German 4-6-7 1sq) into the BasicPiece

stats.provenance: PROVISIONAL infantry subset: squads 4 MF, leaders 6 MF (ASLRB A4.5 base rates; leader-bonus MF, double time, road-column effects not modeled yet). Verify against Bruce's ASLRB.

movement.note: PROVISIONAL ASLRB chapter B infantry COT subset. Walls/hedges (+1 crossing) not yet extracted as hexside features — TODO. Roads approximated as hex terrain (real rule: road rate along road depiction).
